violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) in the produce area were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink in the produce area was (100) parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be (150-400) ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

Chicken was observed held at 119 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC re-heated food at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
Knives were in poor repair (observed heavily chipped). PIC took equipment out of service at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the fans and fan covers in the meat department have an accumulation of dust. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

The floors under storage shelves in the produce area have an accumulation of food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/13/2024

Several items were observed in the hand-washing sinks at the cafe and produce prep areas. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
The hand-washing sink in the ware-washing facilities of the produce prep area was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
Infant formula was observed held past its permitted date marking. PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

Logs were not accurately kept for using time as a public health control at time of inspection. PIC instructed staff on proper record retention. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024

The presence of flies is not controlled as evidenced by an accumulation of flies observed in cafe area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2024

The following items were observed in poor repair: 1) A pair of knives were observed with chipped and/or warped blades 2) The seals/gaskets of walk-in cooler doors were missing/loose 3) Several air curtains were broken 4) The cover/door of ice machine in the cafe area was missing New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of several fans and fan covers throughout walk-in cooler areas have an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2024

The floors in the produce prep and storage areas have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the delivery bread racks have an accumulation of rodent droppings. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

The floor in the retail area underneath shelving has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris and a small amount of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment to clean under all shelving. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023

Multiple foods in the prepared foods section and grab n go section was observed held below 135 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. All foods were moved or PIC elected to dispose rather than reheating. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023

Multiple foods were observed held at 44-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods that were held for less than 4 hours were moved to colder refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023

The following equipment was observed in poor repair/unable to maintain foods internal temperature: -The cold rail in the deli area -The hot hold unit in the prepared foods area -The grab n go hot hold unit. ALL units were taken out of service at the time of inspection. Units to not be used until unit can hold food at adequate temperatures. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2023

Multiple foods in the prepared foods section and grab n go were observed held under 135 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were recently placed in units and were reheated or PIC elected to dispose of food. Prepared foods PIC to monitor foods in unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023

Multiple foods were observed held at 44-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods that were held for less than 4 hours were moved to colder refrigeration. Foods held greater than 4 hours were elected to be disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023

Establishment is bottling juice. All bottles of juice were removed from shelves and placed under embargo. Establishment to cease bottling juice until approved from RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023

The following equipment was observed in poor repair/unable to maintain foods internal temperature: -The reach-in unit in the meat department -The cold rail in the pizza area -The cold rail in the deli area -The hot hold unit in the prepared foods area -The grab n go hot hold unit. All units were taken out of service and work orders were placed to service units. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the knife holders have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2023
